title: Droids, Technology and the Force: A Clash of Phenomena (article)
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
{{Youmay|the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] article|the [[Droids, Technology and the Force: A Clash of Phenomena|in-universe essay]]}}
'''''Droids, Technology and the Force: A Clash of Phenomena''''' was an article written by [[Abel G. Peña]] for [[StarWars.com]]'s [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] section. It was published in [[March]] of [[2005]], and features the [[in-universe]] perspective of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tam Azur-Jamin]]. Peña is listed as the "translator", rather than the author of the article.

{{Website-stub}}
